title: Whispers Beneath Caer Vorn
logline: A Summoner delves into the buried ruins below a forgotten city to learn why its people vanished and end the decay leaking upward.
setting: Caer Vorn is a quiet town built atop the collapsed shell of an ancient city. Below its streets, dungeon floors twist with old magic and restless dead. The Summoner arrives as the town's well begins to run black.

acts.name: Act I: The Descent Begins
beats: Arrive in Caer Vorn and speak with Warden Hella
Accept the quest to investigate the well
Enter the Upper Catacombs and defeat roaming husks
Reach the flooded junction and learn of the lower seal
acts.climax: Discover the broken wardstone in the Upper Catacombs

acts.name: Act II: Roots of the Rot
beats: Recover the Sealed Page from a cursed scholar
Cross the Bone Gallery and avoid collapsing floors
Confront the parasite cultist feeding on the city's memory
acts.climax: Defeat the Parasite Cultist in the Hollow Sanctum

cast.name: Warden Hella
cast.concept: Town authority who gives the investigation quest

cast.name: Husk Hound
cast.concept: Weak undead attacker encountered in Upper Catacombs

cast.name: Cursed Scholar
cast.concept: Debuffer spirit guarding the Sealed Page

cast.name: Parasite Cultist
cast.concept: Corrupted summoner spreading decay through the ruins

maps.title: Caer Vorn
maps.concept: Hub town above the ruins with a poisoned well

maps.title: Upper Catacombs
maps.concept: First ruin layer with broken wards and husks

maps.title: Sunken Library
maps.concept: Flooded archive holding a sealed page

maps.title: Bone Gallery
maps.concept: Collapsing hall of old bones and traps

maps.title: Hollow Sanctum
maps.concept: Cultist's ritual chamber beneath the city

quests.name: Investigate the Well
quests.summary: Enter Upper Catacombs to find why the well runs black

quests.name: Recover the Sealed Page
quests.summary: Retrieve the page from Sunken Library to learn the seal

quests.name: End the Cultist
quests.summary: Descend to Hollow Sanctum and stop the Parasite Cultist

ending: The Summoner banks the fallen creatures' EXP, seals the Hollow Sanctum, and Caer Vorn's well runs clear again as the decay ends.
